start.speaker: Pliable
start.text: Well, he's gone back — more fool him! Now, tell me again about the place we're bound for. The crowns, the music, the golden streets. Is it all really ours just for the walking?
start.text_zh: 好啦，他回去了——真是个傻瓜！来，再跟我讲讲我们要去的那地方吧。那些冠冕、那音乐、那金色的街道。只要走到了，就真的都归我们吗？

choices.text: The reward is real and endless — but the way to it is hard, and no tale told to flatter us.
choices.text_zh: 那赏赐是真实而无尽的——但通往它的路很难，绝不是一则讨好我们的故事。

choices.text: There is a kingdom that does not fade, and a life that never ends. The book promises it.
choices.text_zh: 那里有不衰残的国度，有永不止息的生命。书上是这样应许的。

choices.text: Stay close to me, and you'll see it for yourself.
choices.text_zh: 紧跟着我，你就会亲眼看见。

glory.speaker: Pliable
glory.text: Oh, this is excellent! My heart could burst. Come, let us mend our pace — I can hardly wait to be there!
glory.text_zh: 哦，这太美妙了！我的心都要炸开了。来，我们加快脚步吧——我都等不及要到那儿了！

choices.text: Gladly — but steady your feet. The nearest ground is not the easiest.
choices.text_zh: 好极了——但站稳你的脚。最近的这段路，并不是最好走的。

choices.text: Then run, friend — let joy carry us both!
choices.text_zh: 那就跑吧，朋友——让喜乐带着我们俩！

uneasy.speaker: Pliable
uneasy.text: Hard? You did not say hard. Well... then let us hurry through the unpleasant parts, and think only of the good that comes after.
uneasy.text_zh: 难？你可没说过难。好吧……那我们就快些穿过那些不愉快的部分，单想着随后而来的好处。

choices.text: Keep your eyes open as well as your hopes, and walk on.
choices.text_zh: 盼望要睁着眼，脚步也要睁着眼——继续走吧。

eager.speaker: Pliable
eager.text: I think only of the end! Whatever lies between, surely it cannot be much. Lead on — quickly, quickly!
eager.text_zh: 我只想着那结局！无论中间有什么，总不至于太难。带路吧——快些，快些！

choices.text: (He skips ahead, eyes on the horizon, watching nothing underfoot.)
choices.text_zh: （他蹦跳着抢到前头，眼盯着天边，却全不看脚下。）
